response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software development fundamentals with 18+ years of experience and software craftsmanship practices, they fail to meet two critical required qualifications: native-level Japanese language proficiency is not listed, and their C programming expertise is limited to a single role from 10+ years ago. Recent career focus (5+ years) on web/backend development in JavaScript/TypeScript creates a substantial skills gap for an embedded firmware security role requiring current Linux kernel and C proficiency.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience with proven software craftsmanship and testing practices
C/C++ development background from National Instruments role building embedded measurement software
Polyglot programmer with demonstrated ability to learn and apply different languages and domains
concerns: Missing native-level Japanese language proficiency, listed as a required qualification
C programming expertise is 10+ years outdated; primary recent work in JavaScript/TypeScript web/backend
No demonstrated experience with networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, network switches, SNMP)

key_factors.factor: C proficiency and embedded systems currency
